chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P.No.D-1100 of 2024 C.P.No.D-1101 of 2024 C.P.No.D-1102 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on contempt applications. 03.12.2025 Mr. Sandeep Kumar advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, AAG along with Syed Muhammad Chairman BISE Mirpurkhas = Through the instant petition, the petitioner seeking direction respondent Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education BISE Mirpurkhas to appoint children to any suitable post as per their qualification, on the quota reserved for employees who retired from service under the policy of BISE. In their support they relied upon order passed by this Court in C.P.No.D-1029. This Court vide order dated 02.9.2024 disposed of the petition in the following terms and directed Chairman BISC Mirpurkhas in view candidature of the candidates as put forward by the petitioner for any ministerial post under the law and policy to decide the their application within one month. “3. It appears that the respondents are reluctant to file comments to defend their case as notice has already been issued to them vide Orders dated 1-10-2022, 22-11-2022 and 18-10-2023, but no comments have been furnished, leaving this Court to go through the pleadings of the parties on the issue of employees quota under the policy decision. 4 Prima facie, the issue is related to the appointment based on employees' quota in the respondent BISE and it is for the competent authority to look into this aspect of the case and if the children of the petitioners have applied earlier for the subject post and if they are found eligible in all respect, their candidature may be considered under the policy decision of BISE, within one month, as these petitions are pending since 2022.

This Court vide order dated 02.9.2024 disposed of the petition in the following terms and directed Chairman BISC Mirpurkhas in view candidature of the candidates as put forward by the petitioner for any ministerial post under the law and policy to decide the their application within one month. “3. It appears that the respondents are reluctant to file comments to defend their case as notice has already been issued to them vide Orders dated 1-10-2022, 22-11-2022 and 18-10-2023, but no comments have been furnished, leaving this Court to go through the pleadings of the parties on the issue of employees quota under the policy decision. 4 Prima facie, the issue is related to the appointment based on employees' quota in the respondent BISE and it is for the competent authority to look into this aspect of the case and if the children of the petitioners have applied earlier for the subject post and if they are found eligible in all respect, their candidature may be considered under the policy decision of BISE, within one month, as these petitions are pending since 2022. BISE Mirpurkhas to consider the candidature of the candidates as put forward by the petitioners for any ministerial post under the law and policy, after hearing them and decide the fate of their application, within one month.” The Chairman BISE in compliance with the court order has submitted report that he will pass the speaking by hearing the petitioner within one month and thereafter if any adverse order is passed against them the petitioner shall be at liberty to availa remedy in accordance with law. Contempt application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
